Our Story

Born in Lagos.
Crafted for Prestige.

Prestigious Scents was founded with one conviction: every person deserves to smell extraordinary — not just on special occasions, but every single day. We believe fragrance is the most intimate expression of identity.

Our perfume oils are 100% undiluted — no water, no alcohol that fades within hours. Just pure, concentrated fragrance that stays with you from morning to midnight. Inspired by the world's finest designer houses, reformulated for the Nigerian climate and sensibility.

◈

Pure Concentration

Our oils carry 20–30% more fragrance concentration than standard eau de parfum, ensuring a presence that lasts all day.

◈

Designer-Inspired Range

From Creed Aventus to Victoria's Secret Bombshell — we offer over 50 iconic fragrance profiles at accessible price points.

◈

Nationwide Delivery

Based in Lagos with fast, reliable delivery across Nigeria. WhatsApp us and receive your order at your doorstep.

Why Choose Us

The Prestigious
Difference

◉

Pure & Undiluted

No alcohol. No water. Our perfume oils are 100% concentrated, which means they last significantly longer on your skin — up to 12–16 hours on a single application.

◉

Designer-Inspired

Access the world's most coveted fragrance profiles — from Creed to Chanel, Dior to Tom Ford — at a fraction of the retail price, without compromising on quality.

◉

Skin-Friendly Formula

Alcohol-free formulations are gentler on sensitive skin. Our oils moisturise as they scent, making them ideal for all skin types, including those with allergies to spray perfumes.

◉

Wide Variety

With over 50 fragrance profiles across multiple bottle formats — from miniature travel sizes to 100ml statement bottles — there is a Prestigious Scent for every personality.

◉

Fast Local Delivery

Based in Lagos with swift delivery across Nigeria. Order on WhatsApp and receive your package within 24–48 hours in Lagos, and across major cities nationwide.

◉

Wholesale Available

We supply to retailers, beauty shops, and resellers at competitive wholesale pricing. Grow your business with Prestigious Scents as your trusted fragrance partner.

Our Promise

Fragrance is
Identity

"A person who smells good carries an invisible confidence that no outfit can replace."

At Prestigious Scents, we believe that luxury should not be reserved for the few. Our mission is to make world-class fragrance accessible to every Nigerian — without compromise on quality, longevity, or experience.
